zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Crawford於1380年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可 易亞斯特時，他的父親Malcolm Crawford61歲，母親Margaret Galbraith45歲。他於1410年與Miss Galbraith結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1445年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Crawford于1380年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾格林可 易亞斯特时，他的父亲Malcolm Crawford61岁，母亲Margaret Galbraith45岁。他于1410年与Miss Galbraith结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1445年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Crawford was born in 1380, in Greenock East, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Malcolm Crawford, was 61 and his mother, Margaret Galbraith, was 45. He married Miss Galbraith in 1410. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1445, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Crawford est né en 1380, à Greenock East, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Malcolm Crawford, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Margaret Galbraith, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Miss Galbraith en 1410. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Crawford 1380 in Greenock East, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Crawford 61 und seine Mutter Margaret Galbraith 45. Er hat 1410 Miss Galbraith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1445 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Crawford è nato il nel 1380 nel Greenock East, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Malcolm Crawford, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Galbraith, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Miss Galbraith nel 1410. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Crawfordが1380年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノック エアストで生まれた時，父Malcolm Crawfordは61歳，母Margaret Galbraithは45歳であった。1410年にMiss Galbraithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1445年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Crawford(이)가 1380년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Crawford(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Galbraith(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1410년 Miss Galbraith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1445년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Crawford nasceu em 1380, em Greenock East, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Malcolm Crawford, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Galbraith, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Miss Galbraith em 1410. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Crawford родился в 1380 г. в местности гринокк эаст, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Malcolm Crawford было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Galbraith, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss Galbraith в 1410 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1445 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Crawford nació en 1380, en Greenock East, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Malcolm Crawford, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Margaret Galbraith, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Miss Galbraith en 1410. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
